response:
Yes, both Tionne Watkins and Park So-yeon have been members of a girl group.

*   **Tionne Watkins** (stage name T-Boz) is a member of the American girl group **TLC**, which was formed in 1990.
*   **Park So-yeon** (stage name Soyeon) is a former member of the South Korean girl group **T-ara**, where she served as the main vocalist.
